name: Cossack Roast (Beef)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Marinade (see 1/2 cup Apple cider instructions)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the meat in a deep roaster.
2. Combine the spices with the first measure of onions and garlic.
3. Cover the meat with the mixture.
4. Pour the vinegar over the meat.
5. Cover and refrigerate for 24 hours, turning the meat after 12 hours.
6. Preheat the oven to 275 degrees.
7. Remove the meat from the roaster and pour off the reserved liquid.
8. Return the meat to the roaster and return the indicated amount of marinade to the roaster.
9. Add the cider vinegar, water, and raisins to the roaster.
10. Cover and cook for 2 1/2 hours.
11. Melt butter in a skillet and add carrots, turnips, second measure of onions, and cabbage.
12. Cook until slightly browned.
13. Spread vegetables over the meat.
14. Roast for an additional half hour.
15. Remove the roast from the roaster and slice.
16. Skim fat from the liquid in the roaster pan.
17. Serve vegetables alongside the meat slices.
